text: I feel a sense of anticipation in this space—a modern building devoted to creation and discovery. Everything is clean, ordered, yet filled with the silent hum of potential. Stepping into the R+D area, I am surrounded by artifacts and displays celebrating human curiosity and innovation. There is inspiration in the recognition that I, too, am part of this unfolding story of research and imagination. I am quietly eager, alert to the possibilities that new knowledge brings.
